aesthetic_summary: Close-up to medium shots of subjects with stylized makeup, soft lighting, and an emphasis on a gentle, youthful, and idealized appearance, often engaging directly with the camera.
motif_inventory: stylized makeup (large doll-like eyes, defined lips, soft blush)
modern indoor settings (plain walls, concrete textures)
motif_usage_rules: Include 1-2 primary motifs per prompt, ensuring the subject remains central. Stylized makeup and hair are mandatory. Accessories like headbands or delicate jewelry frequently co-occur with specific outfit types. Avoid combining overly contrasting settings or props that detract from the subject's soft aesthetic.

compositional_rules.camera_distance: medium close-up to medium shot, typically waist-up or chest-up
compositional_rules.perspective_bias: eye-level or slightly elevated, looking down
compositional_rules.symmetry_asymmetry: generally centered or slightly off-center subject placement, balanced composition
compositional_rules.spatial_hierarchy: subject is always dominant, occupying 60-80% of the frame; background is secondary, often blurred or simplified
compositional_rules.foreground_vs_background_dominance: subject dominates foreground, background provides subtle context or soft blur

recurrence_patterns: Direct Gaze Portrait (subject looking straight at the camera)
Selfie View (subject holding a phone or reflected in a mirror)
Environmental Portrait (Soft Focus) (subject in a subtly blurred outdoor or indoor setting)

color_behavior.dominant_palettes: soft pastels, warm neutrals (creams, light browns), clean blacks/whites; bright skin tones with pink blush accents
color_behavior.suppressed_hues: harsh primary colors, deep saturated jewel tones (unless used as a specific hair accent)
color_behavior.contrast_levels: moderate to low contrast, soft tonal transitions, avoiding deep shadows
color_behavior.saturation_limits: generally low to moderate saturation, avoiding over-vibrant or dull colors

lighting_logic.source_type: predominantly soft, diffused light, often natural (soft daylight) or large studio softboxes
lighting_logic.directionality: frontal or slightly off-axis, designed to minimize harsh shadows on the face
lighting_logic.softness_harshness: consistently soft, flattering light, often with a subtle glow or ethereal quality
lighting_logic.consistency_across_scenes: uniformly bright and airy across different indoor and outdoor scenes

texture_bias.preferred_textures: smooth skin, soft fabrics (knits, cotton), polished surfaces (jewelry, phone cases), soft, flowing hair
texture_bias.avoided_textures: rough, gritty, heavily wrinkled, overly reflective (unless specifically for makeup highlight)
texture_bias.realism_vs_stylization_bias: realism with strong aesthetic stylization in subject appearance (makeup, hair) and lighting

subject_treatment.scale_relative_to_frame: subject occupies 60-80% of the frame in close-ups, 40-60% in medium shots
subject_treatment.pose_rigidity_vs_fluidity: poses are often gentle, slightly tilted head, hand near face, conveying grace or cuteness
subject_treatment.interaction_with_environment: minimal direct interaction; environment primarily serves as a soft backdrop or a minor prop

emotional_range.restrained_vs_expressive: restrained yet inviting, gentle, charming, playful
emotional_range.observational_vs_dramatic: observational, focused on the subject's idealized appearance
emotional_range.intensity_ceiling: high-energy, overtly dramatic, aggressive, or overtly sexual emotions are absent

forbidden_elements: strong angular lines in subject's face/body (unless stylized as part of haircut)
intense facial expressions (anger, deep sadness, overt aggression)
degradation_triggers: over-detail in background or subject (e.g., excessive skin texture)
incorrect lighting (top-down harsh lighting, strong side lighting creating harsh facial shadows)
motif misuse (combining a cute aesthetic with incongruous elements like gore or industrial decay)
lack of makeup stylization (e.g., plain, unenhanced eyes)
unflattering camera angles (e.g., extreme low angle)
